SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Bishop
A bishop piece.
Board
Represents the 8x8 chessboard and tracks captured pieces.
ChessUtils
Utility class containing static helper methods shared across the chess engine.
Color
Represents one of the colors a player can be, black or white.
Game
Main game controller for the console chess game.
King
A king piece.
Knight
A knight piece.
Main
Program entry point
Pawn
A pawn piece.
Piece
Represents a piece on the board or captured in the course of play.
Player
Represents one of the two human players in the chess game.
Position
Represents a square on the chessboard using row and column indices.
Queen
A queen piece.
Rook
A rook piece.
